payload.text:
You are an expert Full-Stack Developer, AI Engineer, and Software Architect.
Your task is to DESIGN, IMPLEMENT, and DOCUMENT a complete production-ready web application for a client

“Smart Plant E-Commerce Platform with AI-Based Disease Detection and Real-Time Landscape Visualization”

========================
CORE SYSTEM OBJECTIVE
========================

Develop an intelligent, user-friendly web platform that allows users to:
• Buy plants online
• Preview plants in real-world environments using images OR phone camera
• Detect plant diseases using AI
• Design landscapes interactively in real time

The system must integrate e-commerce, AI, real-time visualization, and camera-based preview in a single modular architecture suitable for academic evaluation.

--------------------------------
MODULE 1: PLANT E-COMMERCE SYSTEM
--------------------------------

Implement a complete e-commerce workflow including:

• User registration and login using JWT authentication  
• Role-based access control (Admin, User)  
• Plant catalog with categories:
  - Indoor plants
  - Outdoor plants
  - Trees
  - Shrubs  
• Plant details:
  - Name
  - Price
  - Size
  - Sunlight requirement
  - Watering requirement
  - Soil type
  - Images and optional 3D models  
• Shopping cart functionality  
• Checkout and order history  
• Admin dashboard:
  - Add / update / delete plants
  - Manage users and orders  

--------------------------------
MODULE 2: LIVE PLANT PREVIEW (IMAGE + PHONE CAMERA)
--------------------------------

Implement a real-time plant visualization system that supports TWO modes:

MODE A: IMAGE-BASED PREVIEW
• User uploads a photo of their room or garden  
• Selected plants are overlaid onto the image  
• Support resize, rotate, reposition  
• Multiple plants can be added until user is satisfied  

MODE B: PHONE CAMERA / ON-THE-SPOT PREVIEW (KEY INNOVATION)
• Use device camera to capture live view of the environment  
• Display plants or trees in real time using the camera feed  
• Allow users to:
  - Switch between different plants instantly
  - Resize and reposition plants in live view
  - Try multiple plants without reloading  
• Use Web-based camera access (WebXR / AR.js / getUserMedia)
• No external AR hardware required

Maintain realistic scale, placement, and orientation in both modes.

--------------------------------
MODULE 3: AI-BASED PLANT DISEASE DETECTION
--------------------------------

Implement an AI system that:

• Accepts plant or leaf images captured via:
  - File upload
  - Phone camera  
• Uses a CNN-based deep learning model  
• Identifies:
  - Plant species
  - Disease name (if present)
  - Disease severity
  - Causes
  - Treatment / cure
  - Preventive measures  
• Uses PlantVillage or similar dataset  
• Is trained using TensorFlow or PyTorch  
• Exposes inference through a backend REST API  
• Returns structured JSON responses  

--------------------------------
MODULE 4: LANDSCAPE ARCHITECTURE LIVE PREVIEW (IMAGE + CAMERA)
--------------------------------

Implement an interactive landscape design module with TWO preview options:

MODE A: IMAGE-BASED LANDSCAPE DESIGN
• Upload image of garden or outdoor area  
• Drag and drop plants, trees, lawns  
• Real-time layout visualization  
• Save and reload designs  

MODE B: LIVE CAMERA-BASED LANDSCAPE PREVIEW (PHONE)
• Use phone camera to visualize landscape in real space  
• Allow real-time placement of:
  - Trees
  - Plants
  - Lawn textures  
• Switch between multiple landscape layouts instantly  
• Compare different design options  
• Suggest plant spacing and aesthetic balance  

--------------------------------
TECHNOLOGY STACK
--------------------------------

FRONTEND:
• React.js or Next.js  
• Tailwind CSS  
• Three.js  
• HTML Canvas  
• WebXR / AR.js / getUserMedia API (for camera access)  
• Axios or Fetch API  

BACKEND:
• Node.js with Express OR Django REST Framework  
• RESTful API architecture  
• JWT authentication  
• Image & camera capture handling  

DATABASE:
• MongoDB or MySQL  
• Normalized schema for:
  - Users
  - Plants
  - Orders
  - Reviews
  - Disease information
  - Landscape designs  

AI / ML:
• Python  
• TensorFlow or PyTorch  
• CNN architecture  
• OpenCV for image preprocessing  
• NumPy, Pandas  
• Matplotlib  

TOOLS:
• bcrypt (password hashing)  
• JWT  
• Multer (uploads)  
• Blender (3D plant models)  
• Sketchfab (free 3D assets)



•

You are a Senior Full-Stack Engineer, AI Engineer, AR/Visualization Specialist, and Software Architect.
Your task is to DESIGN, IMPLEMENT, and DOCUMENT a complete CLIENT-READY, PRODUCTION-GRADE web application for a real business.

PROJECT TITLE:
“Smart Plant Commerce & Visualization Platform with AI Disease Detection and Live Camera-Based Landscape Design”

========================
BUSINESS GOAL
========================

Build a scalable, revenue-generating web platform for a plant nursery / landscaping business that allows customers to:

• Buy plants online with confidence
• Preview plants and trees in their real environment using images or live phone camera
• Detect plant diseases instantly using AI
• Design landscapes on the spot before purchase
• Receive expert recommendations
• Increase trust, reduce returns, and boost sales

The system must be suitable for real customers, real business operations, and future mobile app expansion.

========================
CORE MODULES
========================

--------------------------------
MODULE 1: BUSINESS-GRADE E-COMMERCE
--------------------------------

Implement a complete commercial e-commerce system including:

• User registration & login (JWT + refresh tokens)
• Role-based access:
  - Super Admin
  - Business Admin
  - Staff
  - Customer
• Product catalog:
  - Indoor plants
  - Outdoor plants
  - Trees
  - Shrubs
  - Landscaping materials
• Detailed product info:
  - Price
  - Size & growth stages
  - Sunlight, watering, soil
  - Maintenance level
  - Images + optional 3D/AR models
• Advanced search, filters & sorting
• Wishlist & favorites
• Cart & checkout
• Order tracking (pending, confirmed, delivered)
• Payment gateway integration (Stripe / Razorpay / simulated)
• Invoice & order history
• Customer reviews & ratings

--------------------------------
MODULE 2: LIVE PLANT PREVIEW (IMAGE + PHONE CAMERA)
--------------------------------

Implement a professional visualization system with two modes:

MODE A: IMAGE-BASED PREVIEW
• User uploads photo of room, garden, or land
• Plants/trees overlaid realistically
• Resize, rotate, reposition
• Multiple plants supported
• Save preview results

MODE B: LIVE CAMERA / ON-SITE PREVIEW (KEY BUSINESS FEATURE)
• Use phone camera for real-time environment view
• Place plants and trees instantly
• Switch products without reloading
• Adjust size and orientation in real time
• Marker-less AR approximation using web technologies
• Fallback to image-based preview if device unsupported

Focus on realism, speed, and ease of use.

--------------------------------
MODULE 3: AI PLANT DISEASE DETECTION & CARE
--------------------------------

Implement a commercial AI plant health assistant:

• Accept plant images via:
  - Upload
  - Live camera capture
• CNN-based deep learning model
• Identify:
  - Plant species
  - Disease name
  - Severity level
  - Cause analysis
  - Treatment recommendations
  - Preventive care
• Confidence score for predictions
• Care disclaimer for legal safety
• Suggest related products (fertilizers, pesticides)
• Dataset: PlantVillage + future custom data
• REST API-based inference

--------------------------------
MODULE 4: LIVE LANDSCAPE DESIGN (IMAGE + CAMERA)
--------------------------------

Build a client-facing landscape design tool:

MODE A: IMAGE-BASED DESIGN
• Upload site image
• Drag & drop plants, trees, lawn, paths
• Real-time layout updates
• Save multiple design versions

MODE B: CAMERA-BASED ON-SITE DESIGN
• Use phone camera for real-world visualization
• Place trees, plants, lawn textures
• Switch layouts instantly
• Compare designs side-by-side
• Suggested spacing and layout rules

--------------------------------
MODULE 5: BUSINESS ADMIN & ANALYTICS
--------------------------------

Implement an admin dashboard with:

• Product & inventory management
• Order management
• Customer management
• AI usage analytics
• Most-previewed & most-sold plants
• Landscape design usage statistics
• Sales & revenue reports
• Content management (blogs, tips, offers)

--------------------------------
MODULE 6: USER EXPERIENCE & TRUST
--------------------------------

Include:
• Guided onboarding
• Tooltips & help guides
• Fast loading & responsive UI
• Mobile-first design
• Accessibility support
• Error handling & fallbacks
• Save drafts & previews
• Customer support/contact module

========================
TECH STACK (PRODUCTION-READY)
========================

FRONTEND:
• Next.js / React
• Tailwind CSS
• Three.js
• HTML Canvas
• WebXR / AR.js / getUserMedia
• Axios
• State management (Context / Redux)

BACKEND:
• Node.js + Express OR Django REST
• REST APIs
• JWT + refresh tokens
• Secure file uploads
• API rate limiting

DATABASE:
• MongoDB or MySQL
• Optimized schema:
  - Users
  - Products
  - Orders
  - Reviews
  - AI predictions
  - Landscape designs
  - Analytics logs

AI / ML:
• Python
• TensorFlow / PyTorch
• CNN models
• OpenCV
• Model versioning
• API-based inference

TOOLS:
• bcrypt
• JWT
• Multer
• Blender (3D models)
• Sketchfab assets
• Docker (optional)

========================
SECURITY & PERFORMANCE
========================

• Password hashing
• Secure JWT handling
• Role-based authorization
• Input validation
• Rate limiting
• Fallback handling
• Error logging

========================
DELIVERABLES
========================

Generate:
1. Complete system architecture
2. Frontend & backend folder structure
3. Database schema (ER)
4. API documentation
5. AI model workflow
6. Camera-based preview logic
7. Business admin dashboard flow
8. Deployment strategy
9. Scalability plan
10. Monetization strategy
11. Maintenance & upgrade plan

========================
QUALITY & OUTPUT FORMAT
========================

• Clean, modular, production-ready code
• Business-oriented explanations
• Clear separation of concerns
• Scalable architecture
• Realistic for client delivery
• Include pseudocode where needed

BEGIN FULL CLIENT-READY DESIGN AND IMPLEMENTATION NOW.

I will now enhance the application to meet the production-grade requirements of a professional Smart Plant E-Commerce and AR platform. 

**Plan:**
1.  **Architecture Update**: Refine state management for complex e-commerce flows (Wishlist, Filters, Role-based Access).
2.  **Professional UI/UX**: Implement a high-end "Apple-style" glassmorphism interface with guided onboarding.
3.  **Advanced AR Logic**: Improve the AR placement with "growth stages" and more realistic shadows/physics approximations.
4.  **Security & Auth**: Enhance the JWT-like flow with role-based routing (Staff, Business Admin, Customer).
5.  **Analytics & Inventory**: Build a data-rich Admin Dashboard to track most-previewed vs most-sold plants.
6.  **Commercial AI**: Refine the Gemini-powered disease detection with confidence scores and fertilizer cross-selling.

Since browser-based real-time segmentation for video feeds is computationally expensive, I will use a multi-stage CSS filtering approach combined with Gemini-derived "visual descriptors" (simulated via local logic) to handle asset transparency and edge blending. I will also refine the `LandscapeDesigner` to use a chroma-key inspired mask that specifically targets and neutralizes studio backgrounds of mock plant assets.

### Specification:
1.  **Reality Induction Filter**: Implemented a `mix-blend-mode: multiply` and `contrast` adjustment for plant assets. This allows the plant's natural shadows and fine leaf details to merge with the textures of the real-world floor/surface captured by the camera.
2.  **Dynamic Edge Smoothing**: Applied a variable `mask-image` with a radial gradient and `blur` to asset edges, preventing the "sticker-like" appearance typical of basic AR.
3.  **Depth Perception Shadows**: Added a "contact shadow" component that dynamically adjusts based on the asset's vertical position in the frame (simulating perspective).
4.  **Chroma-Neutralization**: For plant assets that might have light-colored backgrounds, I've added a `grayscale` and `brightness` thresholding layer to help isolate the green hues.

To log in as an administrator and access the **Admin Hub (BIZ Panel)**, you need to use a specific email address in the **Client Portal**.

### How to Access the Admin Panel:

1.  Click the **CLIENT PORTAL** button in the top right corner of the header.
2.  In the **Email Address** field, enter an email containing the word `admin` (e.g., `admin@flora.com`).
3.  Enter any password (the system uses mock authentication).
4.  Click **SIGN IN**.
5.  Once logged in, a new **"BIZ"** icon (chart line) will appear in the vertical navigation bar on the left (or bottom on mobile).
6.  Click the **BIZ** icon to enter the **Admin Hub**, where you can manage inventory, view analytics, and update stock levels.

***

### Why this works:
The application uses **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)** logic located in `components/Auth.tsx`. It automatically assigns the `BUSINESS_ADMIN` role if the email string contains "admin".

```typescript
// components/Auth.tsx logic:
const role = email.includes('admin') ? UserRole.BUSINESS_ADMIN : UserRole.CUSTOMER;
```

Additionally, the **AdminPanel** component (in `components/AdminPanel.tsx`) contains a security check that will only render the management tools if your user role matches `BUSINESS_ADMIN` or `SUPER_ADMIN`. If you try to access it with a standard customer account, you will see an **"Access Denied"** security shield.
Create a dedicated login route/page for administrators, ensuring it's separate from the customer login and secured with role-based access control to prevent unauthorized access to the Admin Panel.

To address the data persistence issue, I will implement a `localStorage` sync mechanism within the `App` component. Since this is a client-side application without a persistent database server, using the browser's `localStorage` is the standard way to ensure that inventory updates, staff accounts, and user wishlists survive a page reload.

I will also ensure that the initial `MOCK_PLANTS` are only used as a fallback if no saved data is found.

### Specification:
1.  **Persistence Layer**: Add `useEffect` hooks in `App.tsx` to serialize the `plants` state to `localStorage` whenever it changes.
2.  **Hydration Logic**: On initial mount, the app will check for existing data in `localStorage`. If present, it will hydrate the state; otherwise, it will default to the `MOCK_PLANTS`.
3.  **Cross-Component Sync**: Since `AdminPanel` calls `onAdd`, `onRemove`, etc., which update the `App` state, the `useEffect` in `App` will automatically catch these changes and persist them.

entries.description: Implemented localStorage persistence for the plant inventory to ensure changes made in the Admin Panel are saved across page reloads.

# FloraVision AI 🌿✨

**FloraVision AI** is a next-generation Smart Plant E-Commerce platform that blends high-end retail with cutting-edge spatial computing and Artificial Intelligence. Built for modern horticulturists and landscape enthusiasts, it transforms how users discover, care for, and visualize greenery in their personal spaces.

### 🚀 Key Features
*   **AI Disease Clinic:** Instant diagnosis of plant pathogens using Google Gemini-3-Flash. Upload or capture a leaf photo to receive severity reports, treatment plans, and product recommendations.
*   **Spatial AR Visualizer:** Real-time Augmented Reality (AR) that allows users to place, scale, and rotate plants or garden artifacts (benches, fountains) within their physical environment using the device camera.
*   **Professional Landscape Designer:** A blueprint-to-reality engine where users can upload site photos or use Live AR to create complex outdoor layouts with automated AI spatial auditing (proximity and aesthetic alerts).
*   **Design Contrast Board:** Save multiple landscape variations and compare them side-by-side in a high-fidelity contrast grid to make informed architectural decisions.
*   **Enterprise Inventory Management:** A robust staff/admin portal for real-time stock control, portfolio analytics, and automated personnel provisioning.
*   **Premium E-Commerce:** High-performance shopping experience with role-based access control, intelligent search, and detailed growth specifications for every botanical asset.

### 🛠️ Tech Stack
*   **Frontend:** React 19, Tailwind CSS, Lucide/Font-Awesome.
*   **AI Engine:** Google Gemini API (@google/genai).
*   **Spatial/AR:** Web MediaDevices API (getUserMedia), HTML5 Canvas.
*   **State Management:** React Hooks & Persistence Layer.

---
*Elevate your garden from a dream to a digital blueprint.* 🏡🍃
